shortDescription: ADR-251 Scattered Code Patterns Audit & Consolidation Roadmap
problem: After ADR-248 (Centralized Auto-Save), a full codebase audit revealed 6 areas with scattered/duplicate code patterns that have existing centralized solutions with low adoption.
cause: Centralized utilities (useAsyncData, getErrorMessage, NotificationProvider, PageLoadingState, useConfirmDialog) exist but were not adopted in older files. No systematic audit existed to track adoption gaps.
solution: Created comprehensive ADR documenting 6 findings with real Grep data: (1) Error Handling — 41 files use getErrorMessage, (2) Data Fetching — 117 scattered vs 10 using useAsyncData, (3) Toast — 14 direct sonner imports, (4) Loading States — 189 files with manual setState, (5) Dialog State — 44 files, (6) Form Validation — 6 files. Defined migrate-on-touch strategy and prioritization matrix.
testing: Documentation only — no code changes. Verified all Grep patterns return expected results.
notes: ADR number changed from 249 to 251 because 249 (Server-Side Integrity Audit) and 250 (Codebase Audit Findings) were already taken. This is documentation ONLY — no source file modifications.

commits.message: docs: add ADR-251 Scattered Code Patterns Audit & Consolidation Roadmap
